content.summary: Feedback loop shader with configurable decay and mix. Blends the current input with the previous frame from a Feedback TOP, creating trails and echo effects.
warnings: Requires a Feedback TOP connected to input 1 (second input) of the GLSL TOP
uDecay values above 1.0 will cause the image to blow out

uniforms.description: Decay multiplier applied to the feedback frame
uniforms.name: uDecay

uniforms.description: Mix factor between feedback and current input
uniforms.name: uMix
